Transcript display functions\n504\tconst showTranscript = () => {\n505\t  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n506\t  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n507\t  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n508\t  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n509\t  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n510\t};\n511\t\n512\tconst hideTranscript = () => {\n513\t  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n514\t  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n515\t  updateLayoutMode(false);\n516\t};\n517\t\n518\tconst clearTranscript = () => {\n519\t  transcriptMessages = [];\n520\t  renderTranscript();\n521\t  updateLayoutMode(false);\n522\t};\n523\t\n524\t// Find message by itemId\n525\tconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n526\t  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n527\t};\n528\t\n529\t// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\n530\tconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n531\t  // Check if already exists\n532\t  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n533\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n534\t    itemId,\n535\t    role,\n536\t    content: '',\n537\t    timestamp: Date.now(),\n538\t    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n539\t  });\n540\t  renderTranscript();\n541\t  showTranscript();\n542\t};\n543\t\n544\t// Update message content by itemId\n545\tconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n546\t  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n547\t  if (index !== -1) {\n548\t    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n549\t    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n550\t    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n551\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n552\t    }\n553\t    renderTranscript();\n554\t    showTranscript();\n555\t    return index;\n556\t  }\n557\t  return -1;\n558\t};\n559\t\n560\t// Add a tool call message to the transcript\n561\tconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n562\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n563\t    role: 'tool',\n564\t    type: 'tool_call',\n565\t    toolName: name,\n566\t    toolArgs: args,\n567\t    callId: callId,\n568\t    status: 'pending',\n569\t    result: null,\n570\t    timestamp: Date.now()\n571\t  });\n572\t  renderTranscript();\n573\t  showTranscript();\n574\t};\n575\t\n576\t// Legacy function for messages without itemId\n577\tconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n578\t  if (itemId) {\n579\t    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n580\t    if (index !== -1) {\n581\t      // Update existing placeholder\n582\t      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n583\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n584\t      renderTranscript();\n585\t      showTranscript();\n586\t      return;\n587\t    }\n588\t  }\n589\t  // Fallback: add new message\n590\t  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n591\t  renderTranscript();\n592\t  showTranscript();\n593\t};\n594\t\n595\t// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\n596\tconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n597\t  let index;\n598\t  if (itemId) {\n599\t    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n600\t    if (index !== -1) {\n601\t      // Use existing placeholder\n602\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n603\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n604\t    } else {\n605\t      // Create new with itemId\n606\t      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n607\t      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n608\t    }\n609\t  } else {\n610\t    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n611\t    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n612\t  }\n613\t  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n614\t  renderTranscript();\n615\t  showTranscript();\n616\t  return index;\n617\t};\n618\t\n619\t// Append to streaming response\n620\tconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n621\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n622\t  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n623\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n624\t  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n625\t};\n626\t\n627\t// Finalize streaming response\n628\tconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n629\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n630\t  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n631\t  if (finalContent) {\n632\t    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n633\t  }\n634\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n635\t  streamingResponse = null;\n636\t  renderTranscript();\n637\t};\n638\t\n639\tconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n640\t  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n641\t  if (!container) return;\n642\t\n643\t  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n644\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n645\t    return;\n646\t  }\n647\t\n648\t  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n649\t  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n650\t    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n651\t    if (streamingEl) {\n652\t      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n653\t      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n654\t      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n655\t      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n656\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n657\t      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n658\t      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n659\t      return;\n660\t    }\n661\t  }\n662\t\n663\t  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n664\t  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n665\t  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n666\t\n667\t  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n668\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n669\t    return;\n670\t  }\n671\t\n672\t  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n673\t    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n674\t    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n675\t      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n676\t      try {\n677\t        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n678\t      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n679\t\n680\t      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n681\t\n682\t      // Response section inside the expandable body\n683\t      let resultHtml = '';\n684\t      if (msg.result) {\n685\t        resultHtml = `\n686\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n687\t            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n688\t            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n689\t          </div>`;\n690\t      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n691\t        resultHtml = `\n692\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n693\t            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n694\t          </div>`;\n695\t      }\n696\t\n697\t      return `\n698\t        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n699\t          <details class=\"tool-call-details\">\n700\t            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n701\t              <span class=\"tool-call-icon\">🔧</span>\n702\t              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${msg.toolName}</span>\n703\t              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n704\t            </summary>\n705\t            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n706\t              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n707\t                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n708\t                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n709\t              </div>\n710\t              ${resultHtml}\n711\t            </div>\n712\t          </details>\n713\t        </div>\n714\t      `;\n715\t    }\n716\t\n717\t    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant';\n718\t    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : 'DUCK-E';\n719\t    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n720\t\n721\t    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n722\t    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n723\t    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n724\t      try {\n725\t        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n726\t      } catch (e) {\n727\t        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n728\t        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n729\t      }\n730\t    } else if (contentHtml) {\n731\t      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n732\t    }\n733\t\n734\t    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n735\t    if (msg.streaming) {\n736\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n737\t    }\n738\t\n739\t    return `\n740\t      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n741\t        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n742\t        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n743\t      </div>\n744\t    `;\n745\t  }).join('');\n746\t\n747\t  container.innerHTML = html;\n748\t\n749\t  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n750\t  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n751\t};\n752\t\n753\t// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\n754\tconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n755\t  try {\n756\t    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ag2client\n757\t    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n758\t\n759\t    // Perf telemetry hooks\n760\t    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n761\t      perfReset();\n762\t      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n763\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n764\t    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n765\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n766\t        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n767\t        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n768\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n769\t      }\n770\t    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n771\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n772\t        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n773\t        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n774\t        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n775\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n776\t      }\n777\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n778\t      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n779\t      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n780\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n781\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n782\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n783\t        const callId = data.call_id;\n784\t        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n785\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n786\t      }\n787\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n788\t      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n789\t        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n790\t        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n791\t          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n792\t          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n793\t          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n794\t        }\n795\t      }\n796\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n797\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n798\t        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n799\t        perfLogSummary();\n800\t      }\n801\t    }\n802\t\n803\t    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n804\t    if (data.type) {\n805\t      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n806\t    }\n807\t\n808\t    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n809\t\n810\t    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n811\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n812\t    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n813\t      const item = data.item;\n814\t      if (item && item.id && item.role) {\n815\t        console.log('Conversation item created:', item.id, item.role);\n816\t        createMessagePlaceholder(item.id, item.role);\n817\t      }\n818\t    }\n819\t    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n820\t    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n821\t      if (data.transcript) {\n822\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n823\t        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n824\t        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n825\t        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset assistant side for new turn\n826\t        if (itemId && findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) {\n827\t          updateMessageByItemId(itemId, data.transcript);\n828\t        } else {\n829\t          // Fallback if no placeholder exists\n830\t          addTranscriptMessage('user', data.transcript, itemId);\n831\t        }\n832\t      }\n833\t    }\n834\t    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n835\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n836\t    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n837\t      if (data.delta) {\n838\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n839\t        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n840\t        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n841\t          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n842\t          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n843\t        }\n844\t        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n845\t      }\n846\t    }\n847\t    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n848\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n849\t    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n850\t      const itemId = data.item_id;\n851\t      if (data.transcript) {\n852\t        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n853\t      }\n854\t      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n855\t        // Finalize with the complete transcript\n856\t        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.transcript);\n857\t      } else if (data.transcript) {\n858\t        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n859\t        console.log('Assistant transcript:', data.transcript);\n860\t        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.transcript, itemId);\n861\t      }\n862\t    }\n863\t    // Assistant's text response DELTA (streaming)\n864\t    else if (data.type === 'response.text.delta') {\n865\t      if (data.delta) {\n866\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n867\t        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n868\t        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'text' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n869\t          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n870\t          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'text';\n871\t        }\n872\t        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n873\t      }\n874\t    }\n875\t    // Assistant's text response completed (for non-audio responses)\n876\t    else if (data.type === 'response.text.done') {\n877\t      const itemId = data.item_id;\n878\t      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'text') {\n879\t        // Finalize with the complete text\n880\t        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.text);\n881\t      } else if (data.text) {\n882\t        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n883\t        console.log('Assistant text:', data.text);\n884\t        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.text, itemId);\n885\t      }\n886\t    }\n887\t    // Function call arguments complete - display tool call card in transcript\n888\t    else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n889\t      const name = data.name;\n890\t      const callId = data.call_id;\n891\t      const args = data.arguments;\n892\t      console.log('Tool call:', name, callId, args);\n893\t      addToolCallMessage(name, args, callId);\n894\t    }\n895\t    // Function call output from backend relay - populate tool result on the card\n896\t    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.create' && data.item?.type === 'function_call_output') {\n897\t      const callId = data.item.call_id;\n898\t      const output = data.item.output;\n899\t      console.log('Tool result received for call_id:', callId, output);\n900\t      const idx = transcriptMessages.findIndex(\n901\t        msg => msg.type === 'tool_call' && msg.callId === callId\n902\t      );\n903\t      if (idx !== -1) {\n904\t        transcriptMessages[idx].result = output;\n905\t        renderTranscript();\n906\t      }\n907\t    }\n908\t    // Output item done - mark matching tool call as completed\n909\t    else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n910\t      const item = data.item;\n911\t      if (item && item.type === 'function_call') {\n912\t        const idx = transcriptMessages.findIndex(\n913\t          msg => msg.type === 'tool_call' && msg.callId === item.call_id\n914\t        );\n915\t        if (idx !== -1) {\n916\t          transcriptMessages[idx].status = 'completed';\n917\t          renderTranscript();\n918\t        }\n919\t      }\n920\t    }\n921\t    // Response cancelled or interrupted - finalize any streaming\n922\t    else if (data.type === 'response.cancelled' || data.type === 'response.done') {\n923\t      if (streamingResponse) {\n924\t        finalizeStreamingResponse();\n925\t      }\n926\t      if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n927\t        // Accumulate token costs from response.done usage data\n928\t        if (data.response?.usage) {\n929\t          updateCostFromResponse(data.response.usage);\n930\t        }\n931\t        // Fire memory extraction if assistant spoke (skips tool-only turns)\n932\t        if (currentTurnUserTranscript && currentTurnAssistantTranscript &&\n933\t            webRTC?.ws?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {\n934\t          webRTC.ws.send(JSON.stringify({\n935\t            type: 'ducke.turn_done',\n936\t            user_text: currentTurnUserTranscript,\n937\t            assistant_text: currentTurnAssistantTranscript,\n938\t          }));\n939\t          currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset for next response in same turn\n940\t        }\n941\t      }\n942\t    }\n943\t    // OpenAI Realtime API error — surface to transcript so it's visible\n944\t    else if (data.type === 'error') {\n945\t      const errMsg = data.error?.message || JSON.stringify(data.error) || 'Unknown error';\n946\t      console.error('[DUCK-E] Realtime API error:', data.error);\n947\t      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Error: ${errMsg}`);\n948\t    }\n949\t    // Custom transcript message from backend\n950\t    else if (data.type === 'transcript') {\n951\t      addTranscriptMessage(data.role || 'assistant', data.content);\n952\t    }\n953\t    // Voice changed — session reinitialised with new WebRTC peer\n954\t    else if (data.type === 'ducke.voice_changed') {\n955\t      const voice = data.voice || 'unknown';\n956\t      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Voice changed to ${voice}`);\n957\t    }\n958\t    // Backend API cost (web_search, memory extraction via gpt-5.4-nano)\n959\t    else if (data.type === 'ducke.backend_cost') {\n960\t      if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = Date.now();\n961\t      sessionCost.backendInputTokens  += data.input_tokens  || 0;\n962\t      sessionCost.backendOutputTokens += data.output_tokens || 0;\n963\t      refreshCostDisplay();\n964\t    }\n965\t  } catch (e) {\n966\t    console.error('Error handling WebRTC message:', e);\n967\t  }\n968\t};\n969\t\n970\t// Function to update the UI elements based on connection status.\n971\tconst updateUI = (status) => {\n972\t  // Main controls\n973\t  const statusIndicator = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator\");\n974\t  const statusText = document.getElementById(\"status-text\");\n975\t  const buttonText = document.getElementById(\"button-text\");\n976\t  const toggleButton = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection\");\n977\t  const muteBtn = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn\");\n978\t  const pttControls = document.getElementById(\"ptt-controls\");\n979\t  // Inline controls\n980\t  const statusIndicatorInline = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator-inline\");\n981\t  const statusTextInline = document.getElementById(\"status-text-inline\");\n982\t  const buttonTextInline = document.getElementById(\"button-text-inline\");\n983\t  const toggleButtonInline = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection-inline\");\n984\t  const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn-inline\");\n985\t  const pttControlsInline = document.getElementById(\"ptt-controls-inline\");\n986\t\n987\t  // Remove all status classes from both\n988\t  statusIndicator.classList.remove(\"connecting\", \"connected\", \"disconnected\");\n989\t  toggleButton.classList.remove(\"connected\");\n990\t  if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.remove(\"connecting\", \"connected\", \"disconnected\");\n991\t  if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.classList.remove(\"connected\");\n992\t\n993\t  if (status === \"connecting\") {\n994\t    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"connecting\");\n995\t    statusText.textContent = \"Connecting to DUCK-E...\";\n996\t    buttonText.innerHTML = '<span class=\"spinner\"></span>';\n997\t    toggleButton.disabled = true;\n998\t    muteBtn.disabled = true;\n999\t    // Inline\n1000\t    if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.add(\"connecting\");\n1001\t    if (statusTextInline) statusTextInline.textContent = \"Connecting...\";\n1002\t    if (buttonTextInline) buttonTextInline.innerHTML = '<span class=\"spinner\"></span>';\n1003\t    if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.disabled = true;\n1004\t    if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.disabled = true;\n1005\t    // Hide PTT controls while connecting\n1006\t    if (pttControls) pttControls.style.display = 'none';\n1007\t    if (pttControlsInline) pttControlsInline.style.display = 'none';\n1008\t  } else if (status === \"connected\") {\n1009\t    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"connected\");\n1010\t    statusText.textContent = \"Connected - DUCK-E is listening\";\n1011\t    buttonText.textContent = \"Disconnect\";\n1012\t    toggleButton.classList.add(\"connected\");\n1013\t    toggleButton.disabled = false;\n1014\t    muteBtn.disabled = false;\n1015\t    // Inline\n1016\t    if (ms / 1000).toFixed(2) + 's' : '?';\n  const delta = (a, b) => (a != null && b != null) ? b - a : null;\n\n  const speechDur = delta(p.speechStarted, p.speechStopped);\n  const transcriptionDur = delta(p.speechStopped, p.transcriptionDone);\n  const thinkingDur = delta(p.transcriptionDone ?? p.speechStopped, p.responseCreated);\n\n  const toolSummaries = Object.entries(p.toolCalls).map(([id, tc]) => {\n    const dur = delta(tc.dispatched, tc.resultReceived);\n    return `tool_call(${tc.name ?? id}): ${fmt(dur)}`;\n  });\n\n  const responseDur = (() => {\n    const afterTools = Object.values(p.toolCalls).map(tc => tc.resultReceived).filter(Boolean);\n    const start = afterTools.length > 0 ?  `speech: ${fmt(speechDur)}`,\n    `transcription: ${fmt(transcriptionDur)}`,\n    `thinking: ${fmt(thinkingDur)}`,\n    ...toolSummaries,\n    `response: ${fmt(responseDur)}`,\n    `total: 'none';\n  }\n};\n\n// Handle OAuth login\nconst handleLogin = () => {\n  // Redirect to Google OAuth\n  const redirectUri = `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}/auth/callback`;\n  window.location.href = `/auth/login?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(redirectUri)}`;\n};\n\n// Handle OAuth logout\nconst handleLogout = () => {\n  clearOAuthState();\n  updateLoginUI();\n\n  // subprotocol or query param\n    // For now, we'll pass it as a query parameter (less secure but functional)\n    // In production, you'd want to pass it via WebSocket subprotocols\n document.getElementById('mute-text-inline');\n\n  const icon = muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';\n  const text = muted ? 'Unmute' : 'Mute';\n\n  if (muteBtn) {\n    if (muted) {\n      muteBtn.classList.add('muted');\n    } else {\n      muteBtn.classList.remove('muted');\n    }\n  }\n  if (muteIcon) muteIcon.textContent = icon;\n  if (muteText) muteText.textContent = text;\n\n  // Update inline controls\n  if (muteBtnInline) {\n    if (muted) {\n      muteBtnInline.classList.add('muted');\n    } else {\n      muteBtnInline.classList.remove('muted');\n    }\n  }\n  if (muteIconInline) muteIconInline.textContent = icon;\n  if (muteTextInline) muteTextInline.textContent = text;\n};\n\n// Update push-to-talk button UI (both main and inline)\nconst updatePTTUI = (enabled) => {\n  console.log('updatePTTUI called with enabled:', enabled);\n  // Main controls\n  const pttToggle = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle');\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttHint = document.querySelector('.ptt-hint');\n  // Inline controls\n  const pttToggleInline = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle-inline');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n\n  if (pttToggle) pttToggle.checked = enabled;\n  if (pttToggleInline) pttToggleInline.checked = enabled;\n\n  // Main PTT button\n  if (pttBtn) {\n    if (enabled) {\n      pttBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n      pttBtn.style.display = 'flex';\n    } else {\n      pttBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n      pttBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Inline PTT button\n  if (pttBtnInline) {\n    if (enabled) {\n      pttBtnInline.classList.remove('hidden');\n      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'flex';\n    } else {\n      pttBtnInline.classList.add('hidden');\n      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Show/hide the hint\n  if (pttHint) {\n    pttHint.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n  }\n};\n\n// Set microphone enabled state\nconst setMicrophoneEnabled = (enabled) => {\n  console.log('setMicrophoneEnabled called:', enabled, 'webRTC:', !!webRTC);\n  if (webRTC) {\n    console.log('webRTC.microphone:', webRTC.microphone);\n    if (webRTC.microphone) {\n      webRTC.microphone.enabled = enabled;\n      console.log(`Microphone ${enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'}`);\n    } else {\n      console.warn('webRTC.microphone not available');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Toggle mute state\nconst toggleMute = () => {\n  console.log('toggleMute clicked, webRTC:', !!webRTC, 'connectionStatus:', connectionStatus);\n\n  // Allow toggling state even without connection (will apply on connect)\n  isMuted = !isMuted;\n  updateMuteUI(isMuted);\n  saveMuteState(isMuted);\n  console.log(`Mute state toggled to: ${isMuted}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n  }\n};\n\n// Toggle push-to-talk mode\nconst togglePushToTalk = () => {\n  console.log('togglePushToTalk clicked, current state:', isPushToTalk);\n\n  isPushToTalk = !isPushToTalk;\n  updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n  savePushToTalkState(isPushToTalk);\n  console.log(`Push-to-talk mode toggled to: ${isPushToTalk}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    if (isPushToTalk) {\n      // Entering PTT mode - disable mic by default\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n    } else {\n      // Leaving PTT mode - restore based on mute state\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Push-to-talk button handlers\nconst startTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.add('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.add('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(true);\n  console.log('PTT: Started talking');\n};\n\nconst stopTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.remove('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.remove('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n  console.log('PTT: Stopped talking');\n};\n\n// Update layout based on chat history (desktop: show inline controls when has content)\nconst updateLayoutMode = (hasHistory) => {\n  const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');\n  if (mainContent) {\n    if (hasHistory) {\n      mainContent.classList.add('has-history');\n    } else {\n      mainContent.classList.remove('has-history');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Transcript display functions\nconst showTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n};\n\nconst hideTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\nconst clearTranscript = () => {\n  transcriptMessages = [];\n  renderTranscript();\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\n// Find message by itemId\nconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n};\n\n// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\nconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n  // Check if already exists\n  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    itemId,\n    role,\n    content: '',\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Update message content by itemId\nconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n  if (index !== -1) {\n    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n    }\n    renderTranscript();\n    showTranscript();\n    return index;\n  }\n  return -1;\n};\n\n// Add a tool call message to the transcript\nconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    role: 'tool',\n    type: 'tool_call',\n    toolName: name,\n    toolArgs: args,\n    callId: callId,\n    status: 'pending',\n    result: null,\n    timestamp: Date.now()\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Legacy function for messages without itemId\nconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n  if (itemId) {\n    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Update existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n      renderTranscript();\n      showTranscript();\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n  // Fallback: add new message\n  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\nconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n  let index;\n  if (itemId) {\n    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Use existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    } else {\n      // Create new with itemId\n      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n    }\n  } else {\n    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n  }\n  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n  return index;\n};\n\n// Append to streaming response\nconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n};\n\n// Finalize streaming response\nconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n  if (finalContent) {\n    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n  }\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n  streamingResponse = null;\n  renderTranscript();\n};\n\nconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n  if (!container) return;\n\n  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n    if (streamingEl) {\n      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n\n  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n      try {\n        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n\n      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n\n      // Response section inside the expandable body\n      let resultHtml = '';\n      if (msg.result) {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n          </div>`;\n      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n          </div>`;\n      }\n\n      return `\n        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n          <details class=\"tool-call-details\">\n            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n              <span class=\"tool-call-icon\">🔧</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${msg.toolName}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n            </summary>\n            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n              </div>\n              ${resultHtml}\n            </div>\n          </details>\n        </div>\n      `;\n    }\n\n    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant';\n    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : 'DUCK-E';\n    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n\n    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n      try {\n        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      }\n    } else if (contentHtml) {\n      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n    }\n\n    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n    if (msg.streaming) {\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n      </div>\n    `;\n  }).join('');\n\n  container.innerHTML = html;\n\n  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n};\n\n// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\nconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n  try {\n    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ag2client\n    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n\n    // Perf telemetry hooks\n    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n      perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        const callId = data.call_id;\n        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n        perfLogSummary();\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n    if (data.type) {\n      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n    }\n\n    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n\n    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.id && item.role) {\n        console.log('Conversation item created:', item.id, item.role);\n        createMessagePlaceholder(item.id, item.role);\n      }\n    }\n    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset assistant side for new turn\n        if (itemId && findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) {\n          updateMessageByItemId(itemId, data.transcript);\n        } else {\n          // Fallback if no placeholder exists\n          addTranscriptMessage('user', data.transcript, itemId);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n        }\n        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n      const itemId = data.item_id;\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n      }\n      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n        // Finalize with the complete transcript\n        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.transcript);\n      } else if (data.transcript) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant transcript:', data.transcript);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.transcript, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's text response DELTA (streaming)\n    else if (data.type === 'response.text.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'text' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'text';\n        }\n        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's text response completed (for non-audio responses)\n    else if (data.type === 'response.text.done') {\n      const itemId = data.item_id;\n      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'text') {\n        // Finalize with the complete text\n        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.text);\n      } else if (data.text) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant text:', data.text);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.text, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Function call arguments complete - display tool call card in transcript\n    else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      const name = data.name;\n      const callId = data.call_id;\n      const args = data.arguments;\n      console.log('Tool call:', name, callId, args);\n      addToolCallMessage(name, args, callId);\n    }\n    // Function call output from backend relay - populate tool result on the card\n    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.create' && data.item?.type === 'function_call_output') {\n      const callId = data.item.call_id;\n      const output = data.item.output;\n      console.log('Tool result received for call_id:', callId, output);\n      const idx = transcriptMessages.findIndex(\n        msg => msg.type === 'tool_call' && msg.callId === callId\n      );\n      if (idx !== -1) {\n        transcriptMessages[idx].result = output;\n        renderTranscript();\n      }\n    }\n    // Output item done - mark matching tool call as completed\n    else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.type === 'function_call') {\n        const idx = transcriptMessages.findIndex(\n          msg => msg.type === 'tool_call' && msg.callId === item.call_id\n        );\n        if (idx !== -1) {\n          transcriptMessages[idx].status = 'completed';\n          renderTranscript();\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Response cancelled or interrupted - finalize any streaming\n    else if (data.type === 'response.cancelled' || data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (streamingResponse) {\n        finalizeStreamingResponse();\n      }\n      if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n        // Accumulate token costs from response.done usage data\n        if (data.response?.usage) {\n          updateCostFromResponse(data.response.usage);\n        }\n        // Fire memory extraction if assistant spoke (skips tool-only turns)\n        if (currentTurnUserTranscript && currentTurnAssistantTranscript &&\n            webRTC?.ws?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {\n          webRTC.ws.send(JSON.stringify({\n            type: 'ducke.turn_done',\n            user_text: currentTurnUserTranscript,\n            assistant_text: currentTurnAssistantTranscript,\n          }));\n          currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset for next response in same turn\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // OpenAI Realtime API error — surface to transcript so it's visible\n    else if (data.type === 'error') {\n      const errMsg = data.error?.message || JSON.stringify(data.error) || 'Unknown error';\n      console.error('[DUCK-E] Realtime API error:', data.error);\n      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Error: ${errMsg}`);\n    }\n    // Custom transcript message from backend\n    else if (data.type === 'transcript') {\n      addTranscriptMessage(data.role || 'assistant', data.content);\n    }\n    // Voice changed — session reinitialised with new WebRTC peer\n    else if (data.type === 'ducke.voice_changed') {\n      const voice = data.voice || 'unknown';\n      addTranscriptMessage('system', `Voice changed to ${voice}`);\n    }\n    // Backend API cost (web_search, memory extraction via gpt-5.4-nano)\n    else if (data.type === 'ducke.backend_cost') {\n      if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = Date.now();\n      sessionCost.backendInputTokens  += data.input_tokens  || 0;\n      sessionCost.backendOutputTokens += data.output_tokens || 0;\n      refreshCostDisplay();\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('Error handling WebRTC message:', e);\n  }\n};\n\n// Function to update the UI elements based on connection status.\nconst updateUI = (status) => {\n  // Main controls\n  const statusIndicator = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator\");\n  const statusText = document.getElementById(\"status-text\");\n  const buttonText = document.getElementById(\"button-text\");\n  const toggleButton = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection\");\n  const muteBtn = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn\");\n  const pttControls = document.getElementById(\"ptt-controls\");\n  // Inline controls\n  const statusIndicatorInline = document.getElementById(\"status-indicator-inline\");\n  const statusTextInline = document.getElementById(\"status-text-inline\");\n  const buttonTextInline = document.getElementById(\"button-text-inline\");\n  const toggleButtonInline = document.getElementById(\"toggle-connection-inline\");\n  const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById(\"mute-btn-inline\");\n  const pttControlsInline = document.getElementById(\"ptt-controls-inline\");\n\n  // Remove all status classes from both\n  statusIndicator.classList.remove(\"connecting\", \"connected\", \"disconnected\");\n  toggleButton.classList.remove(\"connected\");\n  if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.remove(\"connecting\", \"connected\", \"disconnected\");\n  if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.classList.remove(\"connected\");\n\n  if (status === \"connecting\") {\n    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"connecting\");\n    statusText.textContent = \"Connecting to DUCK-E...\";\n    buttonText.innerHTML = '<span class=\"spinner\"></span>';\n    toggleButton.disabled = true;\n    muteBtn.disabled = true;\n    // Inline\n    if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.add(\"connecting\");\n    if (statusTextInline) statusTextInline.textContent = \"Connecting...\";\n    if (buttonTextInline) buttonTextInline.innerHTML = '<span class=\"spinner\"></span>';\n    if (toggleButtonInline) toggleButtonInline.disabled = true;\n    if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.disabled = true;\n    // Hide PTT controls while connecting\n    if (pttControls) pttControls.style.display = 'none';\n    if (pttControlsInline) pttControlsInline.style.display = 'none';\n  } else if (status === \"connected\") {\n    statusIndicator.classList.add(\"connected\");\n    statusText.textContent = \"Connected - DUCK-E is listening\";\n    buttonText.textContent = \"Disconnect\";\n    toggleButton.classList.add(\"connected\");\n    toggleButton.disabled = false;\n    muteBtn.disabled = false;\n    // Inline\n    if (statusIndicatorInline) statusIndicatorInline.classList.add(\"connected\");\n    if (statusTextInline) statusTextInline.textContent = \"Connected\";\n    if (buttonTextInline) buttonTextInline.textContent = \"Disconnect\";\n    if (toggleButtonInline) {\n      toggleButtonInline.classList.add(\"connected\");\n      toggleButtonInline.disabled = false;\n    }\n    if (muteBtnInline) muteBtnInline.disabled = false;\n    // Show PTT controls when connected\n    if (pttControls) {\n      pttControls.style.display = 'flex';\n      pttControls.classList.remove('disabled');\n    }\n    if (pttControlsInline)
